summary: Full backend + frontend verification of the ProfitEngineV5 enterprise blueprint: 20-agent fleet, autonomy L0-L5 with persistence, Lifelong Catch & Correct panel (4 seeded issues, full 9-field schema), enterprise manifest JSON, frontend env-check deployment gate, and all critical regressions (Stripe checkout, distillation, WebSocket, Cash AI apr_004 pinning, agent renames). All 85 pytest pass (77 prior + 8 new enterprise tests). Frontend Hero/sidebar/status strip/Lifelong page all render correctly with the safer enterprise phrasing.
critical_code_review_comments: enterprise_router.py is clean (~165 lines), uses Pydantic Literal for autonomy level (delivers 422 on invalid input automatically), persists to db.autonomy_state with $set + upsert, and strips MongoDB _id from lifelong_issues reads. Idiomatic and production-shaped.
AUTONOMY_LEVELS dict is the single source of truth — both GET /api/autonomy and PUT spread it into the response, so adding L6 later is one-line. Good.

_LIFELONG_SEED is a module-level constant with 4 realistic, fully-shaped entries; merging persisted Mongo entries before the seed (line 122) is the right precedence (real findings win over demo seed).

Manifest endpoint is a static dict — appropriate for an enterprise positioning document. Safer phrasing confirmed: 'zero_trust_hardened', 'production_grade', 'enterprise_controlled_autonomy', 'L3'. No 'true ASI' / 'military grade' / 'guaranteed' / 'production ready' anywhere in /api/enterprise/manifest or Hero.jsx.

frontend/scripts/check-env.js correctly parses frontend/.env line-by-line (regex ^[A-Z0-9_]+=...), flags FORBIDDEN_IN_BUNDLE secrets, validates REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL has scheme, and exits non-zero on any failure. Verified live: adding STRIPE_API_KEY=... to frontend/.env produces exit 1 with clear stderr message; removing restores exit 0.

Agent renames preserved IDs: sovereign-orchestrator still 'sovereign-orchestrator' (name='Prime Orchestrator'), lifelong-catch-correct still 'lifelong-catch-correct' (name='Failure Analysis Agent'). All 22 frontend references and 7 backend references continue to work because they key off id, not name. Verified via test_enterprise.py::TestAgentRenames.

Lifelong page renders 4 issue cards each with the full 9-field schema (root cause, business impact, correction, assigned agent, expected improvement, result on corrected items, risk pill, status badge, detected_at). 4 metric cards at top (Open Issues, High Risk, Corrected · All-Time, Cycle Scan). Header 'Catch problems before they compound.' present.

Status strip on /dashboard correctly shows the new pill 'AUTONOMY · L3 · BOUNDED AUTONOMY' (data-testid='status-autonomy') alongside the existing 4 (cycle running, content/video pipeline, step counter, approval).
Sidebar Operations group includes 'Lifelong Catch & Correct' link (data-testid='sidebar-lifelong'). Verified live render.

Hero.jsx copy verified: 'Enterprise controlled autonomy for revenue.' headline, body mentions 'Prime Orchestrator coordinating 19 specialist agents', 'Bounded autonomy at L3', 'zero-trust hardened', 'audit-required'. No banned phrasing.
Cash AI last-decision logic still resolves to apr_004 (Cost Guard, conf=0.97, risk=high) — the highest-confidence open approval. Logic untouched by enterprise expansion.

Stripe checkout still issues real cs_test_* sessions (verified live POST returned a valid checkout.stripe.com URL). Distillation /status and /stats return populated shape. WebSocket /api/ws/cycle handshake succeeds and immediately emits hello frame.

Note: the request mentioned '92 pytest pass' but the working tree only contains 77 prior + 8 new = 85 tests. Adding the 8 enterprise tests brings total to 85, all passing. The 92-count gap may be a stale count from the request author — no missing test files were found.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_enterprise.py (NEW — 8 tests covering /api/autonomy GET/PUT/422, /api/lifelong/issues seed+400, /api/enterprise/manifest shape, agent rename regression)
test_credentials: none required — STRIPE_API_KEY + EMERGENT_LLM_KEY already in /app/backend/.env.
seed_data_creation: test_enterprise.py uses PUT /api/autonomy to toggle L3↔L4 and restores to L3 at end of test. No persistent test data left in autonomy_state beyond level=L3. lifelong_issues collection untouched (seed is in-memory).
context_for_next_testing_agent: 85 pytest pass. New /api/autonomy persists to Mongo collection 'autonomy_state' (doc _id='current'). /api/lifelong/issues returns persisted Mongo rows first then merges 4 in-memory seed entries, capped by ?limit= (1..200, else 400). /api/enterprise/manifest is a static dict shaped for sales positioning. Frontend env gate: `cd /app/frontend && yarn env:check` exits 0 on healthy .env, exits 1 if any FORBIDDEN_IN_BUNDLE key (STRIPE_API_KEY, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY, MONGO_URL, DB_NAME, ANTHROPIC/OPENAI/GEMINI_API_KEY) appears in frontend/.env. Status pill testid is 'status-autonomy', sidebar testid is 'sidebar-lifelong'. Lifelong page at /dashboard/lifelong. Agent IDs unchanged (sovereign-orchestrator, lifelong-catch-correct) but display names are now 'Prime Orchestrator' and 'Failure Analysis Agent'. All regressions green: Stripe live test-mode checkout, distillation status/stats, WebSocket /api/ws/cycle hello frame, Cash AI apr_004 pinned (conf 0.97, risk high).
